content: I believe this is more of a ‘nice to have’ feature rather than a necessity. It would be helpful if we could select a few AI models to appear in the cycle list (CTRL-SHIFT-R) while using the overlay. Currently, there are more than 10 models, and I would like to use multiple models on a single question. Right now, it requires clicking many times. If we could pre-select the models we want to use in the settings so that the number of models in the cycle list or menu is reduced, that would be a valuable addition.
